    About UnitedHealth Group

    We are a health care and well-being company made up of a diverse team around the world dedicated to making health care work better through two distinct and complementary businesses: Optum and UnitedHealthcare.

  • Careers

    Careers

    UnitedHealth Group is a health care and well-being company dedicated to improving health outcomes for millions of people around the world. We comprise two distinct but complementary businesses, UnitedHealthcare and Optum, working together to build a better health system for all.

  • UnitedHealthcare

    Our mission is to help people live healthier lives and make the health system work better for everyone. We dedicate ourselves to this every day for our members by being there for what matters in moments big and small — from their earliest days to their working years and through retirement.

    We’re a leading health solution and care delivery organization. Our work is complex, but our mission is simple: create a healthier world, with you at the center.

Life here

We are dedicated to making our organization a place where people feel welcomed, valued, heard and respected.

Collaborate with a team of high-energy, passionate individuals working toward the same goals. Join us and you’ll be part of a culture that prioritizes how we achieve our success: Caring. Connecting. Growing together.

Growing together

The people of UnitedHealth Group are dedicated to improving the lives and health of others. Here, you'll discover how you can help drive affordability, accessibility and quality of care for millions of individuals while growing your career.

Early careers programs

We have a variety of full-time, internship, apprenticeship and co-op programs worldwide to help build our next  generation of talent.

Leadership development opportunities

We host initiatives open to all employees interested in becoming high-performing people leaders or improving their  leadership skills.

Career growth and mobility

We offer skill development, tuition reimbursement*, internal growth opportunities and career mapping support.

Employee health and well-being

Delivering on our mission starts with our team members. We recognize that holistic well-being is about more than physical health — it’s about having access to emotional support, feeling financially secure, enjoying time away from work and much more.

View our employee benefits


Giving back and volunteering

We provide employees with dedicated opportunities to make a tangible impact through giving and volunteering.

3.5M hours

Our employees volunteered 3.5M hours in 2024**

$ match

We offer dollar-for-dollar matches on employee donations to eligible organizations

up to $500

We provide $10 in rewards for each tracked volunteer hour, up to 50 hours

Want to receive the latest job opportunities and events from recruiters directly to your texts or email?
Join our talent community
Bringing people together

Sharing experiences through Employee Resource Groups

Our Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) are voluntary, employee-led groups open to all individuals, providing a deeper sense of belonging and community across the organization. ERGs foster collaboration and connections, enabling team members to be heard, supported and valued for their unique contributions.

 

*Tuition reimbursement initiatives vary by region and country. Our benefits documents override any information found on this page.

**Volunteer hours are calculated using employee survey responses and giving site participation data.

UnitedHealth Group is an Equal Employment Opportunity employer under applicable law and qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, national origin, religion, age, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, or protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by local, state, or federal laws, rules, or regulations. UnitedHealth Group is a drug-free workplace. Candidates are required to pass a drug test before beginning employment.
